goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'leicester' and should 'arrive by 18:30'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from leicester and should arrive by 18:30
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
